hero.description: RefBoost is the SaaS platform for partner program management and referral tracking. Automate referral tracking, commissions and your network's performance.
hero.trial_badges: ✓ 14 days free · ✓ No credit card · ✓ Setup in 5 min

features.label: Features
features.title: Everything to manage your
features.description: From the first referral to the commission payment, RefBoost automates every step.

items.title: Referral Pipeline
items.desc: Track every referral from first contact to closing. Kanban view, advanced filters, real-time statuses.

items.title: Automatic Commissions
items.desc: Automatic bonus calculation based on your rules. One-click validation, full history, traceable payments.

items.title: Dashboards & KPIs
items.desc: Conversion rate, generated MRR, performance by partner. Make data-driven decisions.

items.title: Your brand, your platform
items.desc: Fully customize the interface: logo, colors, domain. Your partners work in your universe.

items.title: Enterprise-grade security
items.desc: AES-256 encryption, audit logs, anti-brute force protection. GDPR compliant, ISO 27001 ready.

items.title: Unique tracking links
items.desc: Each partner has their personal link. Automatic attribution, public form, zero friction.

steps.title: Create your workspace
steps.desc: Sign up in 2 minutes. Customize your platform with your visual identity.

steps.title: Invite your partners
steps.desc: Send email invitations. Each partner receives their access and tracking link.

steps.title: Track & reward
steps.desc: Your partners submit leads. You track conversion and pay commissions automatically.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: They manage their referral partners with RefBoost

items.t: We tripled our referral partner channel in 4 months. The tool is intuitive and our partners love it.
RefBoost allowed us to structure our referral program. We could never go back.
No more spreadsheets for tracking commissions. Everything is automated, transparent, and our partners are thrilled.

marketplace.description: Hundreds of companies open their program on RefBoost. Join them for free.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Simple pricing, no surprises
pricing.description: All plans include a 14-day free trial. No commitment.

items.q: What is a referral partner program?
items.a: It's a system that rewards external partners for every customer they refer to you. RefBoost automates everything: tracking, attribution, commission calculation and payment.
5 minutes. Create your account, invite your first partners, and start receiving referrals today.

items.q: Can I customize the platform to match my brand?
items.a: Yes. Logo, colors, custom domain — your partners work in an environment that reflects your brand, not RefBoost's.
You set the rate per partner or globally. With each won deal, RefBoost automatically calculates the bonus and notifies you for validation.
Absolutely. AES-256 encryption, full audit logs, anti-brute force protection, GDPR compliance. We follow ISO 27001 standards.

cta.title: Ready to structure your
cta.description: Join the companies using RefBoost to turn their referrals into recurring revenue.
cta.note: 14 days free · No credit card · Cancel anytime

footer.tagline: The platform for referral partner program management and professional referrals.
